stories.headline: US and Iran reach tentative deal, pending Trump's approval
stories.summary: The US and Iran have agreed to extend the ceasefire by 60 days to make space for further negotiations to end the war but Trump still has to approve the deal, reports said Thursday, citing US officials familiar with the matter.

stories.headline: Washington nearing deal to extend Iran ceasefire, US officials say
stories.summary: Trump administration’s hopes that an agreement is imminent come after both sides exchanged fire

stories.headline: Gaza City hospitals say several killed in strike, as Israel targets Hamas leaders
stories.summary: At least five children were reportedly killed in the strike, which appears to have targeted a Hamas commander.

stories.headline: Iran says it targeted American base after fresh US strikes
stories.summary: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.

stories.headline: US, Iran Truce Hopes Lift Stocks | Open Interest 5/28/2026
stories.summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Stocks climb on reports the US and Iran may extend their truce, pending President Trump’s backing. Software splits as Salesforce disappoints, while Snowflake surges on AI demand. Plus, Goldman’s Ben Snider joins Bloomberg Open Interest on his higher S&P target, Sridhar Ramaswamy, the CEO of Snowflake gives his outlook, Miriam Wheeler calls AI

stories.headline: After stern words from Trump, U.S. and Iran trade strikes
stories.summary: The renewed violence came after the president said Iran was wrong if it thought he would feel pressure to make concessions and resolve the standoff before U.S. midterm elections later this year.

stories.headline: EU will never be a neutral mediator between Ukraine and Russia, says Kallas
stories.summary: The High Representative has dismissed the buzz over a special envoy for talks with Russia, arguing the EU will "never" be a neutral mediator between Moscow and Kyiv. "We have been clearly on Ukraine's side," she said.

stories.headline: US and Iran reach tentative deal for 60-day truce extension, officials say
stories.summary: The memorandum of understanding, which would enable further negotiations, still requires Donald Trump's final approval.

stories.headline: Israel strikes southern Beirut amid increasing escalation in southern Lebanon
stories.summary: The intensification comes after Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced an expansion in the Israeli military's attacks in Lebanon, despite an ongoing ceasefire.

stories.headline: Russia on the back foot with dynamics of war shifting in Ukraine’s favour, EU says – as it happened

stories.headline: Israel hits Lebanese capital in 'targeted strike'
stories.summary: Beirut had until now largely been spared even as both Israel and Hezbollah accused each other of breaking last month's ceasefire.

stories.headline: US justice department launches criminal investigation into Trump accuser E Jean Carroll
stories.summary: The case centres on whether the former columnist lied about the funding she received for her civil lawsuit against the US president.

stories.headline: Man meets Dutch volunteer caring for father's WW2 grave
stories.summary: A Liverpool man says it was "marvellous" to meet the volunteer who cares for his father's war grave in the Netherlands.

stories.headline: Israel strikes Beirut and southern Lebanon after large-scale evacuation orders
stories.summary: The Israeli military has ordered Lebanese residents to leave some 17% of the country's territory.

stories.headline: How Cuba is addressing its housing crisis with shipping containers

stories.headline: Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer Will Not Run for President in 2028
stories.summary: Governor Whitmer of Michigan had been viewed as part of a field of possible Democratic candidates. She has been governor for two terms, and is barred from running again.

stories.headline: Judge Declines, for Now, to Block Mail-In Voting Changes Ordered by Trump
stories.summary: The ruling allowed the Trump administration to continue to pursue changes that include enlisting the Postal Service in checking voters against a national database.

stories.headline: James Talarico Opens Texas Senate Campaign Against Ken Paxton With Houston Rally
stories.summary: Personal attacks and a packed campaign rally set the tone for what is likely to be a rancorous contest in Texas for U.S. Senate between James Talarico and Ken Paxton.

stories.headline: Massie Visits Greene in Costa Rica for Fishing and ‘Spicy’ Political Talks
stories.summary: The two Republican critics of President Trump — Thomas Massie, who lost his House primary last week, and Marjorie Taylor Greene, who resigned from Congress — met up in the tropics.

stories.headline: Justice Dept. Is Said to Open Criminal Inquiry of E. Jean Carroll, Who Accused Trump of Rape
stories.summary: Ms. Carroll, who prevailed in a civil trial after accusing President Trump of sexual abuse, is the latest target in a Justice Department campaign going after his perceived enemies.

stories.headline: Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer says she won’t run for president in 2028
stories.summary: Whitmer, term-limited after two gubernatorial wins in her battleground state, had been widely viewed as a potential Democratic candidate.

stories.headline: Canada signs landmark LNG energy deal with Germany

stories.headline: Very Bifurcated Market in High Yield: Pimco's Forgash
stories.summary: David Forgash, managing director and head of leveraged finance at Pimco, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They speak at the Goldman Sachs Annual Leveraged Finance Conference in Dana Point, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Index Rule Changes for SpaceX IPO 'Odd': Todd Sohn
stories.summary: Todd Sohn, ETF strategist at Strategas, joins Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." Nasdaq instituted a rule change that shortens the time for newly public companies to be added to its index, while S&P Dow Jones and FTSE Russell are considering similar changes. This comes ahead of expected mega IPOs from SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic.  (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Pimco Says Junk Debt for Data Centers Diverging Into Two Markets
stories.summary: Pacific Investment Management Co.’s leveraged finance chief urged investors to be cautious with the high-yield debt that finances data centers, where winners and losers are starting to emerge as issuance booms.

stories.headline: Jefferies Sued by Fund Investors Over ‘Massive’ Water Bond Fraud
stories.summary: Jefferies Financial Group Inc. has been hit with an investor class action lawsuit over bond purchases made by its 352 Capital fund in a water vending machine firm that federal prosecutors have called a scam.

stories.headline: FTC Chairman Ferguson Says Agency Probing Fertilizer Industry

stories.headline: Why Democrats Think They Can Flip Texas

stories.headline: The race for oil: will Jamaica be the next country to drill and what does that mean for its green pledges?
stories.summary: With early tests suggesting the presence of crude oil, the Caribbean island has begun to debate whether it could justify becoming a producerJamaica is closer than ever to drilling for oil. Tests on samples from the seabed off the Caribbean island’s south coast earlier this year identified hydrocarbons, which suggest the presence of crude oil below ground.Jamaica imports all its fuel, which costs about $1.5-2bn (£1.1bn-1.5bn) annually, depending o

stories.summary: Latvia's government reform ensures a pro-Western path as regional drone incidents heighten security concerns.

stories.headline: Lilly's One-Time Cholesterol Treatment
stories.summary:
Eli Lilly is developing a groundbreaking one-time gene-editing treatment that could permanently lower bad cholesterol and reduce heart disease risk. Bloomberg's Madison Muller joins Open Interest to break down the science, the risks, and why Lilly is racing to expand beyond obesity drugs into its next major growth era.

(Correction: The headline of this video has been edited to clarify the treatment) (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Anger grows after China's deadliest coal mining disaster in years
stories.summary: On China's tightly-controlled internet, people are calling for justice and questioning how this happened.
